evals.prompt: Write homepage copy for our B2B project management tool. It helps remote engineering teams track work without the overhead of Jira.
evals.expected_output: Should load product-marketing-context.md first. Should ask about primary audience, conversion goal, and any constraints. Should produce hero headline (multiple options), subheadline, value proposition expansion, feature-to-benefit section, social proof, and CTA. Should include rationale for copy choices. Should lead with outcomes not features.

evals.prompt: Rewrite our pricing page. Currently it just lists features with checkboxes and nobody knows which plan to pick.
evals.expected_output: Should apply the pricing page framework. Should recommend outcome-focused benefit bullets instead of feature checkboxes. Should recommend a recommended plan with clear reasoning. Should write plan descriptions from the customer's perspective. Should provide FAQ content for top pricing objections.
assertions: Recommends outcome-focused benefits over feature lists
